title: FloristryWarehouse Tissue Paper Caramel 240 sheets x 50cm x 75cm
features: Half ream (240 sheets) of top quality Caramel tissue paper sheets by Oasis
Bleed and fade resistant which make it perfect for floristry uses
description: Half ream (240 sheets) of top quality Caramel tissue paper sheets by Oasis. Sheets are flat packed, measure 50cm x 75cm (30 x 20 inch) and are packaged in a protective cellophane packet. Bleed and fade resistant which make it perfect for floristry uses. Acid free and suitable for gift wrapping delicate items. Actual colour may vary a little from the photo depending on your monitor settings.
